alternative.name: Homemade Whole Wheat Atta Biscuits
alternative.recipe: 1. Mix whole wheat flour with a little ghee and jaggery until crumbly. 2. Add a splash of milk to form a firm dough. 3. Roll out the dough and cut into biscuit shapes. 4. Bake until golden and crisp.

alternative.name: Baked Masala Potato Chips
alternative.recipe: 1. Slice potatoes very thinly. 2. Toss with a little oil, salt, and your favorite spices. 3. Spread on a baking sheet and bake at 180°C until crisp. 4. Cool completely and enjoy.
